scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard content accurately: containers/resources linkage, type field, description, matching names. Adds valid upstream-source field and deploy-time override example.
scores.hallucination_notes: The gold standard states description is 'optional' but the agent says it 'is required'. Also the gold standard mentions 'filename' field for file-type resources, which the agent omits (minor omission). The upstream-source field and --resource flag are real/valid additions, not hallucinations.
